name: GLAVA · Phase A — Book Pipeline v4

parameters.jsCode: const body = $input.first().json.body; return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), subject: { name: body.character_name || 'Герой книги', known_birth_year: null, known_details: null }, interview: { id: 'int_001', speaker: { name: 'Рассказчик', relation_to_subject: 'родственник' }, transcript: body.transcript }, existing_facts: null }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Fact Extractor').item.json.text || 'Ты Фактолог. Извлеки все факты из транскрипта. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, subject, persons, timeline, relationships, locations, character_traits, quotes, conflicts, gaps, processing_notes.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Fact Extractor').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 8000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let fact_map = {}; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { fact_map = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); } catch(err) {} } if (!fact_map.subject) { try { fact_map = JSON.parse(t); } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { fact_map } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const fact_map = $('Extract Fact Map').first().json.fact_map; return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), subject: { name: body.character_name || (fact_map.subject && fact_map.subject.name) || 'Герой книги' }, fact_map: fact_map, transcripts: [{ interview_id: 'int_001', speaker_name: 'Рассказчик', relation_to_subject: 'родственник', text: body.transcript }] }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Ghostwriter').item.json.text || 'Ты Писатель-биограф. На основе карты фактов напиши 4 главы книги. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, version, phase, chapters (id, title, order, content, facts_used, is_modified), table_of_contents, callouts, historical_notes, writing_notes.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Ghostwriter').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.5, max_tokens: 12000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let book_draft = { chapters: [], callouts: [], historical_notes: [] }; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); if (p.chapters) book_draft = p; } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { book_draft } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const fact_map = $('Extract Fact Map').first().json.fact_map; const book_draft = $('Extract Book Draft').first().json.book_draft; const chapters = (book_draft.chapters || []).map(ch => ({ id: ch.id, title: ch.title, content: ch.content, facts_used: ch.facts_used || [] })); return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), iteration: 1, max_iterations: 3, book_draft: { chapters }, fact_map: fact_map, transcripts: [{ interview_id: 'int_001', speaker_name: 'Рассказчик', relation_to_subject: 'родственник', text: body.transcript }] }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Fact Checker').item.json.text || 'Ты Фактчекер. Проверь текст книги на соответствие карте фактов и транскрипту. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, iteration, verdict (pass/fail), errors, warnings, completeness_check, regression_check, summary.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Fact Checker').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 4000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let result = { verdict: 'pass', warnings: [] }; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); if (p.verdict) result = p; } catch(err) {} } const book_draft = $('Extract Book Draft').first().json.book_draft; return [{ json: { verdict: result.verdict || 'pass', warnings: result.warnings || [], book_draft } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const fcr = $('Extract Fact Checker Result').first().json; const book_draft = fcr.book_draft; const warnings = (fcr.warnings || []).slice(0, 5); const chapters = (book_draft.chapters || []).map(ch => ({ id: ch.id, title: ch.title, content: ch.content, facts_used: ch.facts_used || [] })); return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), iteration: 1, max_iterations: 2, book_draft: { chapters: chapters, callouts: book_draft.callouts || [], historical_notes: book_draft.historical_notes || [] }, fact_checker_warnings: warnings }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Literary Editor').item.json.text || 'Ты Литературный редактор. Отшлифуй текст книги: единый голос, переходы, устранение шаблонов. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, iteration, verdict, chapters (id, title, content, is_modified), callouts, historical_notes, edits_log, style_assessment.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Literary Editor').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.4, max_tokens: 12000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let result = { chapters: [], callouts: [], historical_notes: [] }; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); if (p.chapters) result = p; } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { chapters: result.chapters || [], callouts: result.callouts || [], historical_notes: result.historical_notes || [] } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const le = $('Extract from Literary Editor').first().json; return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), book_text: { chapters: le.chapters, callouts: le.callouts || [], historical_notes: le.historical_notes || [] } }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Proofreader').item.json.text || 'Ты Корректор. Исправь орфографию, пунктуацию, типографику. Единообразие имён, дат, кавычек, тире. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, chapters (id, title, content, is_modified), corrections, style_passport, summary.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Proofreader').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 12000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let bio_text = raw; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); if (p.chapters && p.chapters.length > 0) { bio_text = p.chapters.map(ch => ch.content || '').filter(Boolean).join('\n\n'); } } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { bio_text } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const fact_map = $('Extract Fact Map').first().json.fact_map; const book_draft = $('Extract Book Draft').first().json.book_draft; const subject = fact_map.subject || {}; const chapters_summary = (book_draft.chapters || []).map(ch => ({ id: ch.id, title: ch.title || '', covers_period: '', brief_content: (ch.content || '').slice(0, 300) + '...' })); return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), subject: { name: body.character_name || subject.name || 'Герой книги', birth_year: subject.birth_year || null, death_year: subject.death_year || null, birth_place: subject.birth_place || null }, gaps: fact_map.gaps || [], timeline: (fact_map.timeline || []).map(ev => ({ id: ev.id, date: ev.date, title: ev.title, life_period: ev.life_period, confidence: ev.confidence })), persons: (fact_map.persons || []).map(p => ({ id: p.id, name: p.name, relation_to_subject: p.relation_to_subject })), locations: (fact_map.locations || []).map(l => ({ id: l.id, name: l.name, period: l.period || null })), conflicts: fact_map.conflicts || [], book_chapters_summary: chapters_summary, transcripts_summary: { count: 1, speakers: ['Рассказчик'], total_topics_covered: 'Биографические факты из интервью' } }) }}];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Interview Architect').item.json.text || 'Ты Интервьюер. Составь 12-18 уточняющих вопросов для клиента на основе пробелов в биографии. Вопросы тёплые, конкретные. Верни только валидный JSON с полями: project_id, questions (id, text, category, priority, related_gap, suggested_respondent, what_it_unlocks), question_groups (theme, question_ids, intro_for_client), summary.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Interview Architect').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.5, max_tokens: 4000 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let questions_text = raw; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); const lines = []; if (p.question_groups && p.question_groups.length > 0) { p.question_groups.forEach(group => { lines.push(''); lines.push(group.theme); if (group.intro_for_client) lines.push(group.intro_for_client); (group.question_ids || []).forEach((qid, i) => { const q = (p.questions || []).find(q2 => q2.id === qid); if (q) lines.push((i + 1) + '. ' + q.text); }); }); if (lines.length > 0) questions_text = lines.join('\n'); } else if (p.questions && p.questions.length > 0) { questions_text = p.questions.map((q, i) => (i + 1) + '. ' + q.text).join('\n'); } } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { questions_text } }];

const body = $('Webhook').first().json.body; const bio_text = $('Extract from Proofreader').first().json.bio_text || ''; const questions_text = $('Extract from Interview Architect').first().json.questions_text || ''; const character_name = body.character_name || 'Герой книги'; return [{ json: { wrapped_input: JSON.stringify({ phase: 'A', project_id: String(body.draft_id || body.telegram_id), character_name: character_name, book_status: 'ready', chapters_count: 4, book_excerpt: bio_text.slice(0, 400), delivery_type: 'phase_a_v1' }), bio_text: bio_text, questions_text: questions_text, character_name: character_name } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Get Prompt: Producer').item.json.text || 'Ты Продюсер. Книга клиента готова. Напиши тёплое, персонализированное вступительное сообщение для Telegram о том, что первая версия книги (v1) готова. Обратись к герою книги по имени. Упомяни, что книга состоит из 4 глав. Напомни, что прилагается список уточняющих вопросов — отвечать необязательно. Верни только текст сообщения (без JSON, без разметки).' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Wrap for Producer').item.json.wrapped_input } ], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 500 }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content; let intro_message = raw; const t = raw.trim(); const s = t.indexOf('{'); const e = t.lastIndexOf('}'); if (s !== -1 && e > s) { try { const p = JSON.parse(t.slice(s, e + 1)); intro_message = p.client_note || p.telegram_message || p.intro || p.message || (p.delivery_package && p.delivery_package.client_note) || raw; } catch(err) {} } return [{ json: { intro_message } }];
